printed.name: Long Back Stretch
printed.setup: Facing risers, hands placed on footbar, shoulder width apart, fingers facing feet, arms straight, feet dorsiflexed against shoulder rests, trunk upright in neutral spine position

movement.exhale: Curl pelvis up, simultaneously move carriage out and straighten arms creating straight diagonal line with body, round trunk, move carriage back to stopper

cues: Maximize and maintain trunk flexion when bringing carriage in
